title: Link to Connected Board Item from Popup Item Card

posts.author: MomoWatanabe (Momo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi. Requesting a much needed feature, a simple solution to jump straight into the specific item (to see all details, subitems and more) from a pop-up item card of a connected board column.
Currently, the “connect board” function allows one board to display (and edit) another board’s information. Thats fine. What I need is to be able to go to that specific item using a link/button. As it is now, the link (top of the pop up item card) is only to the board itself - which means I have to search within the board for this particular item.
High-level board <> detailed project board connection will really benefit from this, thanks very much!
